scripts.lint:rust: cd contracts && cargo clippy --workspace --target wasm32v1-none -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --all -- --check
scripts.payroll:setup: yarn payroll:ptau && npx snarkjs groth16 setup circuits/payroll/build/payroll.r1cs circuits/payroll/ptau/powersOfTau28_hez_final_19.ptau circuits/payroll/build/payroll_0000.zkey && npx snarkjs zkey contribute circuits/payroll/build/payroll_0000.zkey circuits/payroll/build/payroll_final.zkey --name='ZetaPay payroll contribution' -v -e='zetapay payroll entropy' && npx snarkjs zkey export verificationkey circuits/payroll/build/payroll_final.zkey circuits/payroll/build/verification_key.json
scripts.payroll:prove: npx snarkjs groth16 prove circuits/payroll/build/payroll_final.zkey circuits/payroll/build/witness.wtns circuits/payroll/build/proof.json circuits/payroll/build/public.json
scripts.payroll:verify: npx snarkjs groth16 verify circuits/payroll/build/verification_key.json circuits/payroll/build/public.json circuits/payroll/build/proof.json
scripts.payroll:all: yarn payroll:inputs && yarn payroll:witness && yarn payroll:prove && yarn payroll:verify && yarn payroll:fixtures
scripts.payroll:rebuild: yarn payroll:clean && yarn payroll:compile && yarn payroll:setup && yarn payroll:all
scripts.pool:setup:deposit: yarn pool:ptau && npx snarkjs groth16 setup circuits/pool/build/deposit.r1cs circuits/pool/ptau/powersOfTau28_hez_final_19.ptau circuits/pool/build/deposit_0000.zkey && npx snarkjs zkey contribute circuits/pool/build/deposit_0000.zkey circuits/pool/build/deposit_final.zkey --name='ZetaPay pool deposit contribution' -v -e='zetapay pool deposit entropy' && npx snarkjs zkey export verificationkey circuits/pool/build/deposit_final.zkey circuits/pool/build/deposit_verification_key.json
scripts.pool:setup:withdraw: yarn pool:ptau && npx snarkjs groth16 setup circuits/pool/build/withdraw.r1cs circuits/pool/ptau/powersOfTau28_hez_final_19.ptau circuits/pool/build/withdraw_0000.zkey && npx snarkjs zkey contribute circuits/pool/build/withdraw_0000.zkey circuits/pool/build/withdraw_final.zkey --name='ZetaPay pool withdraw contribution' -v -e='zetapay pool withdraw entropy' && npx snarkjs zkey export verificationkey circuits/pool/build/withdraw_final.zkey circuits/pool/build/withdraw_verification_key.json
scripts.pool:prove:deposit: npx snarkjs groth16 prove circuits/pool/build/deposit_final.zkey circuits/pool/build/deposit_witness.wtns circuits/pool/build/deposit_proof.json circuits/pool/build/deposit_public.json
scripts.pool:verify:deposit: npx snarkjs groth16 verify circuits/pool/build/deposit_verification_key.json circuits/pool/build/deposit_public.json circuits/pool/build/deposit_proof.json
scripts.pool:prove:withdraw: npx snarkjs groth16 prove circuits/pool/build/withdraw_final.zkey circuits/pool/build/withdraw_witness.wtns circuits/pool/build/withdraw_proof.json circuits/pool/build/withdraw_public.json
scripts.pool:verify:withdraw: npx snarkjs groth16 verify circuits/pool/build/withdraw_verification_key.json circuits/pool/build/withdraw_public.json circuits/pool/build/withdraw_proof.json
scripts.pool:rebuild: yarn pool:clean && yarn pool:compile:deposit && yarn pool:compile:withdraw && yarn pool:setup:deposit && yarn pool:setup:withdraw
scripts.contracts:test: yarn contracts:zetapay-verifier:test && yarn contracts:zetapay-payroll:test && yarn contracts:zetapay-pool:test
scripts.contracts:deploy:verifier: stellar contract deploy --wasm contracts/target/wasm32v1-none/release/zetapay_verifier.wasm --source-account zetapay-deployer --network testnet --alias zetapay-verifier
scripts.contracts:deploy:payroll: stellar contract deploy --wasm contracts/target/wasm32v1-none/release/zetapay_payroll.wasm --source-account zetapay-deployer --network testnet --alias zetapay-payroll
scripts.contracts:deploy:pool: stellar contract deploy --wasm contracts/target/wasm32v1-none/release/zetapay_pool.wasm --source-account zetapay-deployer --network testnet --alias zetapay-pool
scripts.contracts:deploy: yarn contracts:build && yarn contracts:deploy:verifier && yarn contracts:deploy:payroll && yarn contracts:deploy:pool
scripts.pool:all: yarn pool:inputs:deposit && yarn pool:witness:deposit && yarn pool:prove:deposit && yarn pool:verify:deposit && yarn pool:inputs:withdraw && yarn pool:witness:withdraw && yarn pool:prove:withdraw && yarn pool:verify:withdraw && yarn pool:fixtures
scripts.zetapay:test: yarn payroll:rebuild && yarn pool:rebuild && yarn pool:all && yarn contracts:test
scripts.zetapay:full-deploy: yarn lint && yarn type-check && yarn lint:rust && yarn zetapay:test && yarn contracts:deploy
